projected coordinate reference system

Search: Download Options: Format: 

Description: coordinate reference system derived from a geographic coordinate reference system by applying a map projection

PropertyValue
typeClass
isDefinedBy18-005r4.html
labelprojected coordinate reference system (rdf:langString) (iso6391:en)
subClassOfderived coordinate reference system (geocrs:DerivedCRS)
definitioncoordinate reference system derived from a geographic coordinate reference system by applying a map projection (rdf:langString) (iso6391:en)
